'''鈭歮-ch-d-th''' ('''kamachdethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:eckle|eckle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-ch-d-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eckle|eckle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-ch-d-th
|-
! Lemma
| kamachdethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimachdethoko|thimachdethoko]] || [[word:jimachdethoko|jimachdethoko]] || [[word:shimachdethoko|shimachdethoko]] || [[word:kimachdethoko|kimachdethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumachdethoko|thuthumachdethoko]] || [[word:jujumachdethoko|jujumachdethoko]] || [[word:shushumachdethoko|shushumachdethoko]] || [[word:kukumachdethoko|kukumachdethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumachdethoko|thumachdethoko]] || [[word:jumachdethoko|jumachdethoko]] || [[word:shumachdethoko|shumachdethoko]] || [[word:kumachdethoko|kumachdethoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomachdethoko|thomachdethoko]] || [[word:jomachdethoko|jomachdethoko]] || [[word:shomachdethoko|shomachdethoko]] || [[word:komachdethoko|komachdethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomachdethoko|thomachdethoko]] || [[word:jomachdethoko|jomachdethoko]] || [[word:shomachdethoko|shomachdethoko]] || [[word:komachdethoko|komachdethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙machdethoko|th忙machdethoko]] || [[word:j忙machdethoko|j忙machdethoko]] || [[word:sh忙machdethoko|sh忙machdethoko]] || [[word:k忙machdethoko|k忙machdethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamachdethoko|thathamachdethoko]] || [[word:jajamachdethoko|jajamachdethoko]] || [[word:shashamachdethoko|shashamachdethoko]] || [[word:kakamachdethoko|kakamachdethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamachdethoko|thamachdethoko]] || [[word:jamachdethoko|jamachdethoko]] || [[word:shamachdethoko|shamachdethoko]] || [[word:kamachdethoko|kamachdethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamachdethoko|thamachdethoko]] || [[word:jamachdethoko|jamachdethoko]] || [[word:shamachdethoko|shamachdethoko]] || [[word:kamachdethoko|kamachdethoko]]

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
